standard: Rusted chains bolted to the wall
A smashed barrel of salted pork
Scratched tally marks on the wall
A bent iron portcullis, stuck open
undead: A faint wailing from inside the walls
Grave goods scattered across the floor
A crumbling epitaph in Old Common
Claw marks on the inner door
goblinoid: Stolen adventuring gear in a pile
Greasy cooking pot over dead coals
Crude drawing of a human being stabbed
Rope ladder leading to a loft
Furs and pelts nailed to the walls
Dung smeared on the floor (territorial marking)
A leaky waterskin hanging on a peg
arcane: Floating dust motes that follow movement
Arcane notation chalked on the walls
A staff missing its crystal head
underdark: Blind cave fish in a pool
Drow patrol markings on the wall
Pale eyeless creatures flee at approach
A cave-in blocks one passage (DC 16 Athletics to clear)
draconic: Claw gouges on the stone floor
A charred skeleton of a knight
Hoarded junk: tin pots, bent weapons
Gem dust glittering on the floor
A shattered suit of draconic-patterned armor
demonic: Screaming faces in the stone walls
Arcane fire burns in a pit
Shattered mirror fragments on the floor
A pentagram burned into the floor
infernal: Hellish contracts pinned to the wall
A ledger of sins written in blood
The walls feel hot to the touch
Statues of devils in ceremonial poses
A fire that casts no light (magical)
A mosaic of damned souls in the floor tiles
A clock that counts down to something
elemental_fire: Cracks in the floor with lava glow below
A permanent flame jet (harmless if fire resistant)
A forge that never goes cold
elemental_cold: Frozen breath of previous explorers visible on walls
A blizzard in miniature inside a shattered glass orb
fey: A mirror that shows an alternate version of the room
Riddle carved in Sylvan above the door
nature: Tree roots breaking through the ceiling
A natural chimney open to the sky
Druid circle scratched in the floor
A bird's nest in the rafters (long abandoned)
aquatic: Tide marks at 4 ft on the walls
giant: A table with a half-eaten cow on it
Door handles 10 ft off the ground
Giant-sized weapons mounted on the wall
Footprints the size of wagon wheels
A cauldron large enough to cook a horse
A pile of boulders (ranged ammunition for giants)
A throne carved from a single boulder
construct: Mechanical arms affixed to the walls
Gears and pistons visible in the floor
A control panel of levers (purpose unclear)
A ticking clockwork mechanism in the ceiling
